metadata.description: Cross-P&ID super graph for POC P&IDs 006, 007, 008

connectivity_summary.process_flow_description: These three P&IDs cover a pipeline receiving and knock-out system associated with DS-3 and related scraper/launcher infrastructure. pid-006 handles the incoming pipeline and pressure control from DS-3, feeding into scraper and KOD areas, while pid-007 represents the scraper receiver (V004) accepting flow from the DS-3 scraper launcher (V003 referenced in pid-006). pid-008 consolidates fuel gas streams from multiple scraper receivers (DS-1 and DS-3) into a Fuel Gas KOD/treatment package, with a confirmed condensate liquid pathway linking pid-007 to pid-008.

key_connections.description: Condensate from the scraper receiver KOD drum (361-V004) in pid-007 is routed to the Condensate Storage Vessel, which is also referenced as a destination in pid-008, confirming a liquid carryover/condensate transfer path between these two drawings.

Inferred connection: pid-006 references 'TO SCRAPER RECEIVER (DS-3)', and pid-007 references 'FROM SCRAPER LAUNCHER (DS-3) V003', strongly indicating pid-006 feeds the scraper receiver system shown in pid-007, though no explicit inter-P&ID connection record was provided for this link.

isolated_terminators: FUEL GAS N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0049 (pid-006) — references another P&ID not in this set
